steps.expected: Settings page with Data Sources section
steps.observed: Settings page displayed with Data Sources section showing provider connection cards

steps.expected: Provider name dynamic, status badge, last sync time, Sync/Disconnect actions
steps.observed: Oura Ring card shows 'Connected' badge, 'Last synced 4 minutes ago', 'Sync Now' and 'Disconnect' buttons

steps.expected: Provider name dynamic, status badge, last sync time, Reconnect/Disconnect actions
steps.observed: Dexcom CGM card shows 'Token Expired' badge, 'Last synced about 1 month ago', 'Reconnect' and 'Disconnect' buttons

steps.expected: Dialog opens with all supported providers in a grid
steps.observed: Dialog 'Connect a Data Source' opens showing 7 providers in a grid layout
Oura Ring and Dexcom CGM both show 'Connected' badge and are disabled buttons
Garmin Connect, WHOOP, Withings Health Mate, Cronometer, Nutrisense all show 'Coming Soon'

steps.expected: Horizontal bar of connected providers as compact pills, plus Add button
steps.observed: Dashboard shows 'Oura Ring' pill with green dot, 'Dexcom CGM' pill with orange dot, and '+ Add Source' button in a horizontal bar
AddProviderDialog opened showing all 7 providers in grid

VAL-MPUI-004.title: Settings connections section shows all providers

steps.expected: Connections section lists all providers with connect/disconnect/sync actions
steps.observed: Data Sources section shows Oura Ring (Connected, Sync Now, Disconnect) and Dexcom CGM (Token Expired, Reconnect, Disconnect) plus '+ Add Source' button
Active Oura has Sync Now + Disconnect; expired Dexcom has Reconnect + Disconnect; Add Source opens dialog for adding more providers
Dashboard shows empty state with 'Connect a data source to get started' heading, description, and 'Connect a Data Source' CTA button

steps.expected: AddProviderDialog opens with provider grid (not hardcoded Oura link)
steps.observed: AddProviderDialog opened with 7-provider grid. Oura Ring is enabled, others show 'Coming Soon'. No hardcoded 'Connect Oura Ring' link.

steps.expected: Dialog with Coming Soon providers visible
steps.observed: Dialog shows Garmin Connect, WHOOP, Withings Health Mate, Cronometer, Nutrisense as 'Coming Soon'

steps.expected: No OAuth initiated. Shows disabled state or informational message
steps.observed: Toast notification 'Garmin Connect integration is coming soon!' appeared. URL remained on /dashboard. No OAuth redirect occurred.

steps.action: Navigate to /dashboard/settings with account that has expired Dexcom connection
steps.expected: ProviderConnectionCard shows 'Reconnect' button for expired connection
steps.observed: Dexcom CGM card shows 'Token Expired' badge and a prominent 'Reconnect' button alongside 'Disconnect'

steps.action: Verify Reconnect button is present and enabled
steps.observed: Reconnect button (ref=e12/e16) is present, not disabled, and would re-initiate OAuth

steps.expected: Error toast notification appears, page not broken
steps.observed: Red error toast appeared at bottom-right with 'access_denied' message. Dashboard rendered normally behind toast. Sonner toast element visible with data-type='error' and data-visible='true'.

steps.expected: Normal dashboard visible, not a broken page
steps.observed: Dashboard showed ProviderConnectionBar, date range controls, and all normal UI. URL was replaced to /dashboard (error param cleared) after toast display.

frictions.description: OAuth error callback toast is handled in DashboardContent.tsx at /dashboard?error=..., not /dashboard/settings?error=... as initially suggested in the task. Testing on /dashboard/settings showed no toast.
frictions.resolution: Checked source code to find the correct URL handler, tested on /dashboard?error=access_denied which correctly shows the toast.

frictions.description: Toast notification disappears quickly (within ~2s), making screenshot capture timing-sensitive.
frictions.resolution: Used 500ms wait and confirmed toast via Sonner DOM element with data-type='error' and data-visible='true' in accessibility tree.

summary: Tested 8 assertions: all 8 passed. ProviderConnectionCard correctly shows dynamic provider names (Oura Ring, Dexcom CGM), status badges, last sync times, and appropriate actions. AddProviderDialog shows all 7 providers in a grid with Connected/Coming Soon badges. Dashboard has a ProviderConnectionBar with provider pills and Add button. Settings connections section has per-provider actions. Empty dashboard CTA opens AddProviderDialog (no hardcoded Oura link). Coming Soon providers show informational toast without starting OAuth. Expired connections show Reconnect button. OAuth error callback shows error toast notification.
